# ceph_fs (Data Source)

This data source allows you to get information about an existing CephFS filesystem.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ceph_fs" "cephfs" {
  name = "cephfs"
}

output "cephfs_metadata_pool" {
  value = data.ceph_fs.cephfs.metadata_pool
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the filesystem.

### Read-Only

- `data_pools` (Set of String) Data pools attached to the filesystem.
- `metadata_pool` (String) Pool used for filesystem metadata.
